title: 'Straight Out of Pinterest': AAP Dares Delhi CM for House Tour After 'Sheesh Mahal 2.0 Row'
description: AAP has dismissed the BJP's "Sheesh Mahal" images allegedly linked to Arvind Kejriwal as "fake" and said they were sourced from Pinterest, further daring Delhi CM Rekha Gupta and LG to open their own homes for public comparison.
